title: ClinicalTrials.gov registry-integrity analysis: ctgov-sponsor-excess-watchlist
description: Analysis code for the 'ctgov-sponsor-excess-watchlist' component of the Synthēsis Research Article 'Auditing the public clinical-trials record: a registry-integrity atlas of registration, reporting and completion gaps' (Andrew Woo, 2026). Source: ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 full-registry snapshot of 29 March 2026. Software/data author: Mahmood Ahmad (automated analysis pipeline); the paper author (A. Woo) differs from the software author. Released under the MIT licence.
